scale: x/3 (ladder checks passed: thumb-stop/hold, muted-test, swappable-ID)

agreement.metric: share of exemplars where |judge_score - human_score| <= tolerance
agreement.note: promote >= 0.75; 0.65–0.75 = monitor; < 0.65 = noise. A hook passes the ladder only if all three checks hold (score 3); the anchors at 1/2/3 calibrate that boundary.

howToRun: For each exemplar: give marketing-creative-scorer the file BODY (the hook + its predicted behavior) WITHOUT the frontmatter human_score, score per its Stage-06 ladder (checks passed, 0–3), record {id: judge_score} into this dir's grading.json, then run.mjs computes agreement.
